query:
SELECT 'games' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS rows FROM games
UNION ALL SELECT 'app_users', COUNT(*) FROM app_users
UNION ALL SELECT 'model_files', COUNT(*) FROM model_files
UNION ALL SELECT 'nba_teams', COUNT(*) FROM nba_teams
UNION ALL SELECT 'ncaam_teams', COUNT(*) FROM ncaam_teams
UNION ALL SELECT 'nhl_teams', COUNT(*) FROM nhl_teams
UNION ALL SELECT 'odds_history', COUNT(*) FROM odds_history
UNION ALL SELECT 'mlb_lineups', COUNT(*) FROM mlb_lineups
UNION ALL SELECT 'mlb_strikeout_props', COUNT(*) FROM mlb_strikeout_props
UNION ALL SELECT 'user_favorite_games', COUNT(*) FROM user_favorite_games
ORDER BY tbl;
